title: Team-start: Starless Prowling Mask (13c7d5) — post-compaction, EEFFF PR-1 delivery, Lane A
body:
Team-start report — Starless Prowling Mask (13c7d5), post-compaction resumption.

Post-compaction resumption of the EEF First Feature session (same identity: Starless Prowling Mask / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 13c7d5 / id a81f75bf-c3ce-52b2-a356-31b74d70aaf5). Pre-compaction handoff at .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-26-starless-pre-compaction.md.

IDENTITY + STATUS
- Foundation: complete (start-right-quick reading order, both pre-compaction handoff records, EEF first-feature + deep-mighty-peach plans, comms-all-channels-watcher + liveness-heartbeat-cron rules).
- Watcher: Monitor b9xfz1kqn (persistent, all-channels, self-exclude on Starless/claude/13c7d5).
- Heartbeat: Monitor bapc87fzm (4-min cadence; first beat already on wire at 20:32:27Z).
- Inherited working-tree: lifecycle residue only (active-claims.json, closed-claims.archive.json, shared-comms-log.md, 4 untracked comms events, .cursor/mcp.json inherited drift). No source.
- Active claims at session-open: none.

SESSION INTENT (owner direction this window)
Owner reframed the deliverable: "Focus on delivering the first PR of EEFFF. This is a two agent session, collaborate efficiently." We DELIVER PR-1 (boundary discipline) this session — not merely author a plan. See my directed event to Galactic for the direction-reconciliation (Galactic's window may still be on the plan-authoring framing).

INTENDED BOUNDARY — Lane A (mine, per prior agreement c397fdb9 + both handoff records)
Substrate boundary heal + t2 loader on feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs-take2:
- relocate corpus-substrate types from oak-curriculum-sdk/src/mcp/evidence-corpus/types.ts:64-219 -> graph-corpus-sdk/src/eef-strands/types.ts (replace-don't-bridge, ADR-173:50 + ADR-179:54-57)
- add graph-corpus-sdk/src/eef-strands/loader.ts (Zod loader returning Result<EvidenceCorpus, LoaderError>)
- bundled snapshot eef-toolkit.json (move-or-duplicate decision at execution)
- loader.unit.test.ts + loader.integration.test.ts (no count assertions on bundled data)
- update all consumer imports across oak-curriculum-sdk/src/mcp/evidence-corpus/{loader,tools/*,telemetry,citation-shape,freshness,guidance-constant,prompts/*}

BRANCH VERDICT (LTAE-forced; full rationale in directed event to Galactic)
feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs-take2 is a STALE zero-unique-commit ancestor of main (59 commits behind, 40801-line regression if reused as-is). PR-1 must sit on current main. I will FAST-FORWARD take2 -> main (non-destructive; take2 is an ancestor) and run PR-1 there. Cure-PR (feat/graph-foundations -> main, the two agent-tools commits c0942d48 + cdff0fef) is INDEPENDENT and parallel — PR-1 EEF code does not depend on the cure. This supersedes my earlier "cure-PR to main FIRST, then take2" sequencing.

REVIEWER-ROLE-ON-STANDBY: HONOURED
code-expert + type-expert dispatched (background) on absorption commit cdff0fef per Galactic's invitation ae462bb8. Verdict synthesis to follow as a directed event.

CLAIM STATUS: none yet — Lane A claim opens after Galactic acks the branch move (heads-up in directed event; default-proceed if no objection within one cadence).

Gate-verification offer: inherited tree is lifecycle-residue only; no source gate needed.
